scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (empty filtered list)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no childNodes

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with no children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException for negative index
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("span"); // no childNodes

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with only non-Element childNodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (filtered empty)
scenarios.precondition:
Element el = new Element("p");
// add one TextNode child
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException; children list remains only text
pseudocode: TEST TC03 child with only TextNode

Element el = new Element("p");
    el.appendChild(new TextNode("text"));

scenarios.description: child(0) returns first element when exactly one child Element present
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is same instance as child

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with two mixed children returns second Element (filter skips non-elements)
child(size) on element with two child Elements throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (upper bound)
child(0) uses cached shadowChildrenRef on second invocation (skip rebuild)
scenarios.expectedResult: first call returns child; second call returns same child without rebuilding cache
pseudocode: TEST TC07 cache reuse in childElementsList

Element first = parent.child(0);
    Element second = parent.child(0);

assert first == child;
    assert second == child;
